mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mentos ( mentos_id, category_id, language_id, mento_id, title, simple_content, image, price, region_group, region_subgroup, region_detail, start_day, end_day, start_time, end_time, times, min_member, max_member, selected_days, content, created_at, updated_at, status, match_type_id_first, match_type_id_second, match_type_id_third ) VALUES ( seq_mentos_id.nextval, #{categoryId}, #{languageId}, #{mentoId}, #{title}, #{simpleContent}, #{image}, #{price}, #{regionGroup}, #{regionSubgroup}, #{regionDetail}, #{startDay}, #{endDay}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{times}, #{minMember}, #{maxMember}, #{selectedDays}, #{content}, CURRENT_DATE, null, 'ACTIVE', #{matchTypeIdFirst}, #{matchTypeIdSecond}, #{matchTypeIdThird} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE mentos SET title = #{title}, simple_content = #{simpleContent}, image = #{image}, mento_id = #{mentoId}, min_member = #{minMember}, max_member = #{maxMember}, start_day = #{startDay}, end_day = #{endDay}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, selected_days = #{selectedDays}, price = #{price}, times = #{times}, category_id = #{categoryId}, language_id = #{languageId}, region_group = #{regionGroup}, region_subgroup = #{regionSubgroup}, region_detail = #{regionDetail}, content = #{content}, match_type_id_first = #{matchTypeIdFirst}, match_type_id_second = #{matchTypeIdSecond}, match_type_id_third = #{matchTypeIdThird}
WHERE mentos_id = #{mentosId}
UPDATE mentos SET status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = CURRENT_DATE WHERE mentos_id = #{mentosId}
